overview: After more than thirty years as a top Navy aviator, Maverick trains a group of elite Top Gun graduates for a dangerous mission.
title: Top Gun: Maverick

overview: A new kid in town joins a group of misfit boys who play baseball on a neighborhood sandlot one fateful summer.
title: The Sandlot

overview: An Iowa farmer hears a voice telling him to build a baseball diamond in his cornfield, summoning ghosts of the past.
title: Field of Dreams

overview: A newly appointed Black coach unites a racially divided high school football team in 1971 Virginia.
title: Remember the Titans

overview: The true story of NASA's near-disastrous 1970 lunar mission and the heroic effort to bring the astronauts home.
title: Apollo 13

overview: Carroll Shelby and driver Ken Miles build a Ford race car to challenge Ferrari at the 1966 Le Mans.
title: Ford v Ferrari

overview: A homeless teenager is taken in by a caring family and develops into an NFL prospect.
title: The Blind Side

overview: Hotshot rookie race car Lightning McQueen learns about friendship and life while stranded in Radiator Springs.
title: Cars

overview: A cowboy doll feels threatened and jealous when a flashy new spaceman toy joins his owner's bedroom.
title: Toy Story

overview: A timid clownfish crosses the entire ocean to rescue his captured son with the help of a forgetful fish.
title: Finding Nemo

overview: A theme park of cloned dinosaurs turns deadly when its security systems fail during a tour.
title: Jurassic Park

overview: Archaeologist Indiana Jones races Nazi agents to find the legendary Ark of the Covenant.
title: Raiders of the Lost Ark

overview: A teenager accidentally travels to 1955 and must make sure his parents fall in love so he can return home.
title: Back to the Future

overview: A farmhand braves fantastical perils to rescue his true love from a forced royal marriage.
title: The Princess Bride

overview: An undersized, working-class kid relentlessly pursues his dream of playing football at Notre Dame.
title: Rudy

overview: A new coach leads a small-town Indiana high school basketball team on an improbable championship run.
title: Hoosiers

overview: A bigoted Korean War veteran bonds with his Hmong neighbors and confronts the local gangs threatening them.
title: Gran Torino

overview: Class clashes and chaos unfold among the staff and members at an exclusive golf club.
title: Caddyshack

overview: A family of undercover superheroes is forced back into action to save the world.
title: The Incredibles

overview: A slow-witted but kind-hearted man unwittingly influences several defining decades of American history.
title: Forrest Gump

overview: A World War II squad ventures behind enemy lines to bring home a paratrooper whose brothers were killed.
title: Saving Private Ryan

overview: Two sisters join the first women's professional baseball league during World War II.
title: A League of Their Own

overview: A coal miner's son builds rockets and chases a science scholarship to escape his small mining town.
title: October Sky

overview: A determined housewife defies the odds to guide the legendary racehorse Secretariat to the Triple Crown.
title: Secretariat
